group.name: CLAUDE.md line 100: cap clauses removed, clarity defect left standing

title: User-identified clarity defect in the autonomous-loop paragraph unfixed, undirected, tracked only in a gitignored audit report
statement: On 2026-07-18 the user challenged the readability of CLAUDE.md line 100's autonomous-loop authorization paragraph and the assistant ratified the defect, but no direction arrived and no fix landed before session end: at pinned sha 258aeac0 the line remains a single ~200-word run-on (commit 82500702 removed only the two iteration-cap clauses, not the structure), and the defect's only record is atom DA-01 in the session-audit report under projects/, a path the same session then gitignored -- no substrate item, decision, or gap tracks it.
action: Surface the defect to the user for direction (the record shows he rejected the assistant presuming to bound his decision on it -- whether/when/how is his); on his go, restructure line 100 into discrete declarative rules preserving the binding semantics unchanged; independent of that decision, give the defect a durable carrier (substrate item or equivalent tracked surface) so its only record stops being a gitignored report file.

in: a durable tracking item for the defect
out: the iteration-cap mechanism residue on other carriers (SA-24's ground, TASK-101 included)
rewriting the paragraph without explicit user direction
the gitignore choice for projects/ (user-ruled, landed at 258aeac0)

verify: A durable tracked item (or a recorded user disposition) carries the line-100 clarity defect; if a rewrite was directed, CLAUDE.md line 100 reads as discrete declarative rules with the same binding content and the change is committed.

history.note: new window: commits 6867b011/82500702/258aeac0 + session c41e910c tail

group.name: Session-audit artifact attribution defect (DA-01), user-disavowed, uncorrected

title: DA-01's headline statement frames assistant language as jointly established; user disavowed it on the record and the report still carries it uncorrected
statement: On 2026-07-19 the user disavowed the language of atom DA-01 in the in-repo session-audit report as not his, and the assistant confirmed on the record that the atom's headline statement lifts the assistant's own characterization and frames the defect as jointly established while the user's actual verbatim words sit only in the evidence array, yet at pinned sha 258aeac0 the report file still carries the uncorrected statement and no correction, disposition, or skill-level fix is recorded anywhere.
action: Correct the record: amend DA-01's statement so assistant-authored characterization is attributed to the assistant and only the user's actual position to the user, or record a disposition covering the disavowal; separately assess whether the session-dangling-audit skill's judgment-authoring guidance needs an explicit attribution rule (user words vs. assistant characterization in headline statements) so the defect class does not recur, and track that assessment where the skill's own work is tracked.

in: the session-dangling-audit skill's authoring guidance (assessment only)
out: the line-100 clarity defect DA-01 points at (SA-32)
changing the skill without its owner's direction

verify: DA-01's statement no longer presents assistant language as the user's or as jointly established (or a recorded disposition covers the disavowed atom), and the attribution-rule assessment for the skill exists on a tracked surface.

group.name: 2026-07-19 consolidated audit open set: one item disposed, remainder on ignored-only surfaces

title: Consolidated five-session audit open set left undisposed at session end; two members carried by no durable item
statement: The 2026-07-19 consolidated five-session audit surfaced an eight-item open set (plus one partial) to the user, of which only item 8 received a disposition (git-ignore, landed at 258aeac0) before the session ended; the audit reports live only on gitignored paths (.session-audits/ and the now-ignored projects/), and while most members are already carried by engine atoms, at least two are carried nowhere durable -- DEC-0024/0025/0026 still read status open in decisions.json against their claimed-enacted work, and the planning-cycle-jargon partial (18 sample schemas, config.schema.json, relations.schema.json, ~12 test files) has no tracking item.
action: Give the undisposed remainder of the consolidated open set a durable home: reconcile DEC-0024/0025/0026's open status against their enacted state (close each with its verification, or record why it stays open) and file a tracking item for the planning-cycle-jargon residue; for the members already carried by engine atoms, no new filing -- this atom is the record that the set was surfaced and left undisposed.

in: a tracking item for the planning-cycle-jargon residue
out: open-set members already carried: four unfiled gap payloads (SA-25), FEAT-011/014 flips (SA-26), stale substrate-overview.html (SA-27), unconsumed audit corpus (SA-28), line-100 clarity (SA-32), FGAP-152 task edge (SA-30)
the gitignore disposition of item 8 (user-ruled, landed)

verify: DEC-0024/0025/0026 each read closed with verification or carry a recorded reason to remain open, and a tracked item exists for the planning-cycle-jargon residue (or a recorded user disposition covers each remaining member).
